name_cn:
High Version
 New Coconut Tree Apricot Small
DIOR Book tote Shopping Bag
Larger than the mini size, slightly smaller than the original small size
The vintage D-letter embroidery that swept the fashion world
Fully handmade 3D embroidery with a textured look
Rich vintage artistic atmosphere, simply a walking work of art
Super large capacity is amazing
Especially suitable for girls who want to take their whole home out
Mom bag, briefcase, travel companion
A must-have for fashionistas to complete their look
26.5×21×14cm
